rationale.regulatory-compliance: Proposes assurance cases to demonstrate EU AI Act compliance.
rationale.org-governance: Assurance cases support structured reporting and stakeholder accountability.
rationale.intro-framing: Proposes conceptual assurance cases without yet operationalizing an automated mechanism.
rationale.general-ai: The assurance framework applies to general LLMs, not just coding models.
rationale.risk-security: Focal analysis of adversarial attacks, jailbreaks, and system guardrails.
